response.justification: The candidate is a versatile senior engineer with strong software craftsmanship, some high-scale distributed systems exposure, and a track record of mentoring through workshops and courses. However, he falls well short of the core requirement of 8 years of C++ experience (only brief stints at National Instruments and a thesis project), his infrastructure work is mostly application-level rather than building cloud compute platforms, and he has no formal technical-leadership role managing priorities and cross-team alignment. The profile is a mismatch for a C++-centric cloud platform tech lead position despite general seniority.
strengths: Low-latency, high-throughput distributed systems experience (millions of HTTP requests/sec at Dunnhumby)
Strong engineering practices: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, and testable design
Proven mentor and knowledge-sharer via multi-day courses, workshops, and conference talks
concerns: C++ experience is far below the required 8 years (roughly under 1 year professionally)
No formal technical-lead experience owning strategy, priorities, and cross-team alignment
Limited production cloud architecture and large-scale compute/storage platform background

key_factors.factor: Distributed systems and high-scale backend work
Lack of formal technical leadership role
